productDisplayName: Puma Men Windbreaker Black Ferrari Jacket
description: CompositionBlack windbreaker that has a shell made of 100% nylon and two inner linings made of 100% polyester and 100% nylon respectively, elasticated hemline and cuffs, contoured panels with red piping, cat logo on the right chest and Scudera ferrari badge over the left chest, two insert pockets on the front and mock neck with a zippered seam for the hoodFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low Cool iron Do not dryclean Close all fastenings Wash and iron inside out Wash with similar colours Use detergent for colours Look good and stay comfortable when you get caught in the rain with this black windbreaker from puma. The contoured panels and the elasticated hems give a great Fit while the red piping and the Ferrari badge give a stylish edge. The mock neck has a zippered seam that keeps a concealed hood that can be whipped out when the rains get wild.Team this with jeans and slipons from the wide collection available at myntra.Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
